arts.ttl: Arsenal fans create chant mocking Tottenham hours before Real Madrid showdown
arts.sum: Arsenal fans have descended on the Spanish capital ahead of their Champions League quarter-final clash with Real Madrid as they chant about Tottenham's current predicament

arts.ttl: Tottenham sent huge Eintracht Frankfurt warning ahead of crucial Europa League clash
arts.sum: Koch added: “Well, I think we shouldn’t count on that and shouldn’t expect that Tottenham all of a sudden don’t know how to play football because they are away. The key for success tomorrow will be that we have a good start into the match, we are right away on the pitch and that we make use of the advantage of playing at home.”

arts.ttl: Tottenham without injured Heung-min Son for Eintracht Frankfurt showdown
arts.sum: A huge blow for Spurs ahead of their do-or-die clash

arts.ttl: Tottenham duo could miss 10 matches after controversial FIFA decision
arts.sum: It remains to be seen what exact competitions Tottenham will be playing in next season, in terms of Europe, at least, but there will still be 38 Premier League fixtures and at least two domestic cup matches across the FA Cup and Carabao Cup . The full schedule for the 2025/26 Premier League season is yet to be announced, but Bissouma and Sarr could miss up to six top-flight matches if the fixture list follows the same pattern as this term.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane and Eric Dier set up Champions League reunion with former Tottenham ace
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are in Italy ahead of Wednesday's Champions League quarter-final second leg against Inter Milan, with the Bundesliga side needing to overturn last week's 2-1 defeat at the Allianz Arena if they are to progress to the semi-finals of the competition for the second consecutive season. Dele Alli reunited with his former Tottenham Hotspur team-mates Harry Kane and Eric Dier ahead of the duo's Champions League quarter-final clash against Inter Milan this week.

arts.ttl: Tottenham warned they must survive ‘lion’s den’ in Frankfurt to salvage season
arts.sum: Spurs face Eintracht Frankfurt with their tie finely poised at 1-1 after the first leg

arts.ttl: Spurs sent chilling five-word warning over fiery Frankfurt atmosphere for crunch clash
arts.sum: EINTRACHT FRANKFURT vs SPURS: Ange Postecoglou's side will have to dig deep to reach the Europa League semi-finals following last week's 1-1 draw in north London
Eintracht Frankfurt complete a permanent transfer for Leeds United full-back Rasmus Kristensen for a fee believed to be around £9m.

arts.ttl: ‘What’s going on?’: Carlton Cole stunned by what’s happened with £40m Tottenham player this season
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are having a terrible season, and it’s been tough to not feel sorry for certain Spurs players this season. Indeed, Micky van de...
